question: Flyboys stars which actor who was nominated for an Academy Award for "127 Hours"?

Identify the stars of "Flyboys" from the Wikipedia page for "Flyboys (film)": James Franco, Martin Henderson, David Ellison, Jennifer Decker, and Jean Reno.
Check if any of these actors were nominated for an Academy Award for "127 Hours".
The Wikipedia page for "James Franco" says: "Franco's performance in 127 Hours (2010) earned a Best Actor nomination at the 83rd Academy Awards."
Since James Franco is a star of "Flyboys" and was nominated for an Academy Award for "127 Hours", he is the answer.
Final Answer seems to be James Franco.
